li.p: Channel name (SDS string) - binary-safe channel identifier
Subscriber dict - Hash table mapping client IDs to Client* pointers
Client pointers - Direct pointers to active client structs

ul.li: Enables O(1) broadcast to all subscribers

div.p: PUBLISH channel msg → lookup channel in pubsub.channels → iterate subscribers dict → append to each client's pubsub_buffer → mark fd writable in epoll
